input.prompt: A 2026 Citroen Berlingo family van in deep metallic petrol-blue parked at a sunlit coastal viewpoint over Chefchaouen with soft blue-painted Moroccan village walls behind, three-quarter front angle, a picnic basket and bicycles subtly visible, warm candid lifestyle mood.
